name: Kerala Vision Broadband Limited
notes: Keralavision Broadband Limited is an initiative of independent Cable TV Operators in Kerala under the Cable Operators Association's (COA) guidance. COA is an umbrella union of local cable operators all over Kerala. It is a conglomeration of more than 4000 independent cable networks functioning all over Kerala; its main objective is to develop the Cable TV Industry of Kerala by means of building wider networks, upgrading technology, finding new avenues of activity etc apart from addressing various issues and challenges before the industry for and on behalf of its members.
